fluid_phase_compartment.description: Plasma + gut-luminal fluid where rosmarinic acid encounters nascent C3 convertase assemblies BEFORE they deposit on MSU surface
fluid_phase_compartment.relevant_target: fluid-phase + nascent C3 convertase / activated C3b

msu_surface_compartment.description: Already-deposited C3b + assembled C3 convertase on MSU crystal surface within synovial fluid
msu_surface_compartment.relevant_daf_concentration_nM: 10-500 (model prior, synovial effective concentration after delivery)

compartment_coupling.scenario_independent: Fluid-phase RA inhibition does NOT reduce surface-deposited convertase decay rate (DAF acts on already-assembled enzymes; RA acts on convertase assembly step). Effects are mechanism-independent and compose multiplicatively on REMAINING active fraction.
compartment_coupling.scenario_coupled: Fluid-phase RA inhibition reduces NEW convertase assembly on the surface (fewer convertases deposit → fewer for DAF to act on). DAF effect is therefore PROPORTIONALLY LARGER on the residual surface-deposited enzymes. Effects compose super-additively but only on initial deposition burst.
compartment_coupling.default_assumption: Mostly independent at steady-state (active flare). Surface convertases self-amplify locally via tickover; RA's contribution is to the systemic + gut-luminal C3b deposition substrate pool, not directly to the surface tickover loop. Default: COMPOSE MULTIPLICATIVELY on residual fractions.
compartment_coupling.sensitivity_check: Run both independent + coupled scenarios; report both.

decision_rule_thresholds.rationale: Per parent brief: combined median ≥ 1.5× the better singleton AND 95% CI of combined doesn't overlap 95% CI of either singleton

evidence_tier_labels.model_outputs: Mechanistic Extrapolation (in silico systems composition over published In Vitro kinetic constants)
evidence_tier_labels.input_bioavailability: Clinical Trial (Baba 2004 human single-dose) + Animal Model (Wang 2017 rat oral PK)
evidence_tier_labels.input_daf_kinetics: In Vitro (Fischer 1981 surface-bound C4b2a; Medof 1984 cell-incorporated DAF)
